languages.original_text: "A dangerous question to pose for someone using a Rogue Trader's patronage as a shield against accusations of xenoheresy, 'shereen.'"

languages.text: "Опасный вопрос для кого-то, использующего покровительство Вольного Торговца для личной защиты от обвинений в ксеноереси, "шерин"".

languages.text: 「異教の罪を免れるために、ローグトレーダーの庇護を盾にしている者に対して、危険な質問をするな、シェリーン」
languages.original_text: "A dangerous question to pose for someone using a Rogue Trader's patronage as a shield against accusations of xenoheresy, 'shereen.'"

traits.locale_text: 「異教の罪を免れるために、ローグトレーダーの庇護を盾にしている者に対して、危険な質問をするな、シェリーン。」

languages.text: « Une question dangereuse pour quelqu'un qui se sert de la protection d'{mf|un libre-marchand|une libre-marchande} comme d'un bouclier contre des accusations de xénohérésie, "shereen". »

languages.text: "Eine gefährliche Frage für jemanden, der die Patronage {mf|eines Freihändlers|einer Freihändlerin} als Schild gegen den Vorwurf der Xeno-Ketzerei benutzt, 'Shereen'."

languages.text: "Bir Hür Tacir'in himayesini zeno kâfirliği suçlamalarına karşı kalkan olarak kullanan biri için tehlikeli bir soru 'şirinim'."
languages.original_text: "A dangerous question to pose for someone using a Rogue Trader's patronage as a shield against accusations of xenoheresy, 'shereen.'"

languages.text: «Una pregunta arriesgada viniendo de alguien que se escuda tras el amparo de {mf|un|una} Comerciante Independiente para eludir acusaciones de xenoherejía, 'shereen».
languages.original_text: "A dangerous question to pose for someone using a Rogue Trader's patronage as a shield against accusations of xenoheresy, 'shereen.'"

traits.locale_text: «Una pregunta arriesgada viniendo de alguien que se escuda tras el amparo de {mf|un|una} Comerciante Independiente para eludir acusaciones de xenoherejía, 'shereen».

languages.text: “这么问可有点危险啊，亲爱的。现在的你可是借着行商浪人的庇护，才不至于受到异形学说的指控。”
languages.original_text: "A dangerous question to pose for someone using a Rogue Trader's patronage as a shield against accusations of xenoheresy, 'shereen.'"

traits.locale_text: “这么问可有点危险啊，亲爱的。现在的你可是借着行商浪人的庇护，才不至于受到异形学说的指控。”
